_comment: ESP32-S3 Complete Pin Assignment — Marine Autopilot Controller

uart1.description: NMEA 0183 Input (compass, GPS, APB from chart plotter)

rx.notes: From Jetson via ADuM1201 optoisolator VI1

tx.notes: To Jetson via ADuM1201 optoisolator VO1

i2c0.description: Shared I2C bus for compass, rudder encoder, OLED display. Protected by i2c0_mutex.

adc1_ch5.description: Rudder potentiometer wiper (fallback if AS5048A not installed)
adc1_ch5.notes: Use with 10KΩ+20KΩ voltage divider from 5V pot. RC filter: 1KΩ+100nF.

gpio_solenoid_outputs.description: MOSFET gate drive outputs for hydraulic solenoid valves. Each drives IRLZ44N N-channel MOSFET via 100Ω series resistor with 10KΩ gate pull-down.

gate_driver.description: 9A peak output gate driver. 3.3V logic input compatible. Powered from LM2596 5V rail. Drives MOSFET gate to full 5V for rated Rds(on).
gate_driver.notes: Three TC4420 devices required (PORT, STBD, CLUTCH). Place close to MOSFET gates with short PCB traces.

drive._comment_alternative: Alternative: Replace IRLZ44N with AO3400 logic-level MOSFET (Vgs(th)=1.05V, Rds(on)=42mΩ@Vgs=2.5V, Id=5.7A). Eliminates gate driver but has higher Rds(on).

port.description: Port solenoid — rudder moves to port (left)
port.notes: MOVED from GPIO4 to GPIO13 (GPIO4 reassigned to buzzer per Fix C-09). NEVER active simultaneously with starboard. UF4007 flyback diode required.

starboard.description: Starboard solenoid — rudder moves to starboard (right)
starboard.notes: NEVER active simultaneously with port. UF4007 flyback diode required.

clutch.description: Clutch solenoid — engages autopilot hydraulic drive
clutch.notes: Must energize BEFORE driving port/stbd. Current monitored by ACS712.

gpio_solenoid_outputs._comment_gate_drive: Fix C-01: MOSFET gate drive voltage mismatch. ESP32 GPIO=3.3V, IRLZ44N needs Vgs=5V for rated Rds(on). Gate driver TC4420 required between ESP32 GPIO and MOSFET gate. TC4420 input=3.3V logic compatible, output=high-current 5V gate drive from LM2596 5V rail.

wdg_kick.description: Periodic pulse to MAX6818 external watchdog. Toggled every 100ms.
wdg_kick.notes: WDO output connects to ESP32 EN pin for hardware reset.

gpio_buttons.description: Physical control head button inputs. Active LOW with external 10KΩ pull-ups. Hardware debounce caps (100nF) + software 50ms debounce.

mode.label: MODE
mode.notes: Internal pull-up available; external recommended. Long press >1000ms.

gpio_leds.description: Status indicator LEDs. Active LOW. Current-limited with 330Ω series resistors.

amber.description: Warning (link lost, stale data, low voltage)

buzzer.description: Alarm buzzer via 2N2222 NPN transistor driver (500Ω base resistor)
buzzer.notes: PWM capable for different beep patterns. DO NOT drive directly from GPIO.
buzzer._comment_fix_c09: MOVED from GPIO2 to GPIO4 — GPIO2 is strapping pin on ESP32-S3, must be HIGH at boot for flash boot. External buzzer circuit risk of pulling GPIO2 low causes boot failure in marine environment.

gpio_pwm_reserved.description: Reserved for future proportional hydraulic valve control. NOT USED in standard ON/OFF solenoid mode.

pwm_out.description: Proportional valve PWM output (200-300 Hz). Connect to gate driver if proportional valve installed.
pwm_out.notes: UNUSED by default. WARNING: Do NOT apply PWM to standard solenoid valves.

3v3.description: 3.3V output from onboard LDO — supply sensors and pull-ups

en.description: Chip enable — 10KΩ pull-up to 3.3V. WDO from MAX6818 can pull this LOW to reset.
